+15 Strength / Intellect / Agiility
You heal for 0.7% of your Maximum Health every 2 seconds while in combat.
+4% Stamina
While in combat with a boss your Damage, Healing, and Absorbtion is increased by 5%.

+9% primary stat while you are above 80% health.

(Replaces Might of the Minotaur)

+420 Stamina
+45 Strength / Intellect / Agiility

(Replaces Champion's Heart)

You heal for 2.1% of your Maximum Health every 2 seconds while in combat.

(Replaces Unyielfing Vitality)

+12% Stamina

(Replaces Titan's Blood)

While in combat with a boss your Damage, Healing, and Absorbtion is increased by 15%.

(Replaces Essence of the Conqueror)
Your Damage and Healing effects on characters with more than 50% health have +5% critical strike chance.

+100 Stamina
+100 Critical Strike
Each time an enemy that you dealt damage to dies, you gain Reaper's Reprieve, healing you for 12% of your Maximum Health over 18 seconds.
+3% Critical Strike chance
Your critical strikes do 3% more damage and healing.

Your Damage and Healing effects on characters with more than 50% health have +15% critical strike chance.

(Replaces Sealed Fate)

+300 Stamina
+300 Critical Strike

(Replaces Berserker's Zeal)

Each time an enemy that you dealt damage to dies, you gain Reaper's Reprieve, healing you for 36% of your Maximum Health over 18 seconds.

(Replaces Reaper's Reprieve)

+9% Critical Strike chance

(Replaces Killer Instinct)

Your critical strikes do 9% more damage and healing.

(Replaces Essence of the Deathdealer)
+3% Haste for 10 seconds each time you deal damage to or heal a character that has 30% or less health.

+100 Stamina
+100 Haste
When you are below 50% health you are instantly healed for 8% of your maximum health. This effect can only occur once every 20 seconds.
+3% Haste
You retain +3% Haste from 'Spirit of Heroism' while it is not active.

+9% Haste for 10 seconds each time you deal damage to or heal a character that has 30% or less health.

(Replaces Adrenaline Rush)

+300 Stamina
+300 Haste

(Replaces Thief's Alacrity)

When you are below 50% health you are instantly healed for 24% of your maximum health. This effect can only occur once every 20 seconds.

(Replaces Rogue's Resurgence)

+9% Haste

(Replaces Feline Grace)

You retain +9% Haste from 'Spirit of Heroism' while it is not active.

(Replaces Essence of the Virtuoso)
+5% Expertise for 15 seconds when dealing damage to any enemy for the first time.

+100 Stamina
+100 Expertise
Every 60 seconds you gain a shield that absorbs damage equal to 10% of your maximum health. The shield lasts for 60 seconds.
+3% Expertise
Your ability Cooldowns are reduced by 4%.

+15% Expertise for 15 seconds when dealing damage to any enemy for the first time.

(Replaces First Strike)

+300 Expertise

+12% Ability Cooldown Reduction

(Replaces Essence of the Commander)

Your maximum Spirit Points is increased by 10.

+100 Stamina
+100 Spirit

+3% Spirit

The duration of your Spirit of Heroism is increased by 6 seconds.

Your maximum Spirit Points is increased by 30.

+300 Spirit

(Replaces Mystic's Intuition)

The duration of your Spirit of Heroism is increased by 18 seconds.

(Replaces Essence of the Prophet)

Each time an enemy you are in combat with is defeated, you gain +0.3% Critical Strike, Haste, Expertise, and Spirit for 5 seconds, stacking up to 10 times.

When the duration of Harmonius Soul expires, you lose 1 stack.

+500 Armor
+25 Strength / Intellect / Agility

+3% Strength / Intellect / Agility

Each time an enemy you are in combat with is defeated, you gain +0.9% Critical Strike, Haste, Expertise, and Spirit for 5 seconds, stacking up to 10 times.

When the duration of Harmonius Soul expires, you lose 1 stack.
